caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with an eagle emblem, and large silver over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain and a gold bracelet on his right wrist. He is positioned in front of a white wall featuring a vertical logo with the words "EMPOWER HUSTLE" and several gold stars. To his right, a dark background displays the text "BOSS TALK 101." A digital overlay in the lower corners of the frames shows a logo with a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking with an animated facial expression and slight shifts in head posture. He holds the microphone close to his mouth as he speaks, with his expression transitioning from a slight smile to an open-mouthed speaking position.
